subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Beloved, Who alone is worthy and deserving, Who hath guided His friends unto the streams of His mercy and enlightened them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد محبوبی را لایق و سزاست که دوستان را بجانب فرات رحمت خود راه نمود و آگاه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
